title: isoetes butleri
intro: Isoetes butleri, also known as Butler's quillwort, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the quillwort family (Isoetaceae). It is primarily found in North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation, and provide protection against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Isoetes butleri can be used as a tea or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to create a medicinal infusion.
